description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle in autonomy was stopped with brake lights illuminated in traffic southbound on Embarcadero Street towards Folsom Street. 
When traffic ahead began to move the Zoox vehicle was appropriately following the car ahead at low speed when it was rear ended by 
Vehicle #2 at low speed. The other party did not stop to exchange information and left the scene. There were no injuries and police were not 
called. 
Print
Clear Form
